## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Self-reviewed (AI pass + manual reasoning pass)
- [ ] No unintended files changed (check `git diff`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the linked Issue are met
